channel.title: Starlink on Osvaldo de Sousa
channel.description: Recent content in Starlink on Osvaldo de Sousa

item.title: Your Starlink Dish is a Stratum 1 NTP Server — And Most People Don't Know It
item.description: Starlink quietly added a GPS-based NTP server to every dish. Here's what that means, why it matters, and how to put it to work on your home network.
